---
name: Request a site or bypass
about: Ask to add support for a new website or countdown timer
title: '[Request] '
labels: request-support
assignees: ''
---

**Which website or link shortener?**

Paste the domain or a full example URL where you see the wait or countdown (e.g. example.com or https://example.com/page).




**What happens when you visit?**

Describe the flow in simple steps so we can reproduce it. For example:
- "I open the link, then a 10 second countdown appears"
- "I click 'Continue', then I see a timer before the real page"
- "There is a captcha, then a wait page"




**Anything else?**

Optional: browser, Skip Wait version, or a screenshot if it helps.
